div.div: Lifecycle: open → in_progress → resolved → closed (auto-close 7 days after resolve); open|in_progress → withdrawn; member may reopen resolved within 7 days. Terminal states final; never deleted. work_order link is informational only — no money path.

div.div: Society board: posted by EC via admin. Project board (one per project): posted by that project's PC via /pc — the PC surface's single write. Posts archived, never deleted; edits audited; new post → push to board audience. Announcement-only (no comments v1).

div.div: One-way outbound (Management/EC only; PCs cannot send). WhatsApp only to opted-in members via pre-approved template — otherwise recorded as skipped. Email via SES; one WhatsApp Business number per society. DeliveryEntry is the 'member was informed' audit trail.
